CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2020 Continued To Sep-30-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Twitter, Inc.'S Notice Of Motion And Demurrer To The First Amended Complaint (Continued From July 2, Per Order Filed 6/10/20)
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Videoconference via Zoom):
Peter Borenstein, Esq. 213-362-8740, peter@brnstn.org for Petitioner.
Kyle Wong, Esq. kwong@cooley.com, Lilia Lopez, Esq. llopez@cooley.com, 415-693-2000 of Cooley LLP for Defendant Twitter.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares its views and tentative ruling for reasons stated on the record. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Twitter, Inc.'s Demurrer To The First Amended Complaint.

Taken Under Submission. The Court will issue a ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR# 6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
